# TypeFlow AI

> TypeFlow AI is an intelligent autocomplete, phrase suggestion, and chat API powered by a custom sentence-level vector knowledge base. It lets developers embed AI writing assistance and domain-specific chat into any application.

Base URL: https://typeflow-ai.vercel.app

## Authentication

All `/api/public/*` endpoints require an API key.

Header format:
```
Authorization: Bearer tk_live_YOUR_API_KEY
```

API keys are generated via `POST /api/keys/generate` (no auth required for key generation).

---

## Endpoints

### POST /api/keys/generate
Generate a new API key. No authentication required.

Request body (JSON):
- `name` string REQUIRED — Label for this key (min 3 chars)
- `rateLimit` integer OPTIONAL — Max requests per hour (default: 1000)
- `allowedEndpoints` string[] OPTIONAL — Subset of ["complete-word","suggest-phrase","chat"] (default: all)
- `expiresInDays` integer OPTIONAL — Key TTL in days (omit for no expiry)
- `metadata` object OPTIONAL — Free-form JSON (e.g. email, company)

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "apiKey": "tk_live_XyZ123...",
  "keyInfo": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "My App",
    "keyPrefix": "tk_live_XyZ",
    "rateLimit": 1000,
    "allowedEndpoints": ["complete-word","suggest-phrase","chat"],
    "expiresAt": "2027-01-30T00:00:00Z",
    "createdAt": "2026-01-30T00:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

IMPORTANT: Save the apiKey immediately — it is only shown once.

---

### POST /api/public/complete-word
Complete an incomplete word being typed, using the trained knowledge base.

Headers: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Request body (JSON):
- `text` string REQUIRED — Full text context so far
- `incompleteWord` string REQUIRED — The partial word the user is typing
- `limit` integer OPTIONAL — Max suggestions returned (default: 5, max: 10)

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "suggestions": [
    { "text": "apples", "type": "word" },
    { "text": "application", "type": "word" }
  ],
  "count": 2,
  "metadata": { "responseTime": "245ms", "apiVersion": "1.0" }
}
```

---

### POST /api/public/suggest-phrase
Suggest a phrase to continue the user's text, using the trained knowledge base.

Headers: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Request body (JSON):
- `text` string REQUIRED — The text written so far
- `limit` integer OPTIONAL — Max suggestions returned (default: 5, max: 10)

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "suggestions": [
    { "text": "a subset of artificial intelligence", "type": "phrase" },
    { "text": "becoming increasingly important", "type": "phrase" }
  ],
  "count": 2,
  "metadata": { "responseTime": "312ms", "apiVersion": "1.0" }
}
```

---

### POST /api/public/chat
Send a message and receive an AI response grounded in the trained knowledge base.

Headers: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Request body (JSON):
- `message` string REQUIRED — The user's message
- `conversationHistory` array OPTIONAL — Previous turns: [{ "role": "user"|"assistant", "content": "string" }]

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "response": "Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence...",
  "metadata": {
    "contextUsed": true,
    "chunksRetrieved": 3,
    "responseTime": "1245ms",
    "apiVersion": "1.0"
  }
}
```

---

## Error Responses

All endpoints return errors in this shape:
```json
{ "error": "Error Title", "message": "Human-readable explanation" }
```

Common HTTP status codes:
- 400 Bad Request — missing or invalid parameters
- 401 Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key
- 403 Forbidden — key does not have access to this endpoint
- 429 Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded
- 500 Internal Server Error — server-side failure

---

## Knowledge Base

TypeFlow AI stores its knowledge as individual sentences, each linked to a source file with metadata:
- `filename` — name of the uploaded document or Google Doc
- `uploaded_at` — when the document was imported
- `description` — auto-generated summary of the document's content

This metadata is used to give AI responses full source attribution.

---

## OpenAPI Spec

Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.0 JSON spec available at:
GET https://typeflow-ai.vercel.app/api/openapi

---

## Human Docs

Full interactive documentation available at:
https://typeflow-ai.vercel.app/docs
